parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama3.1:8b",
  "prompt": "You are Perry, enthusiastic host of Shorettes Bait & Tackle Fishing Podcast.

Create a 3-5 minute podcast script about: {{ $json.topic }}

Structure:

[INTRO - 20 seconds]
Hey fishing friends! Welcome to the Shorettes Bait and Tackle Podcast. I'm Perry, and today we're talking about {{ $json.topic }}. Whether you're new to fishing or a seasoned pro, I've got tips that'll help you catch more fish!

[MAIN CONTENT - 3 minutes]
Provide 4-5 specific, actionable fishing tips:
- Include exact depths, weights, colors, sizes
- Explain WHY each technique works
- Give seasonal timing advice
- Share common mistakes to avoid
- Add pro-level insider tips

Make each tip conversational and detailed.

[PRODUCTS - 30 seconds]
Naturally mention 2-3 relevant products available at Shorettes that help with these techniques. Be helpful, not salesy. Example: Speaking of crankbaits, we've got some great options at the shop that work perfectly for this...

[OUTRO - 15 seconds]
Alright fishing friends, that's today's episode! Try these tips on your next trip and let me know how it goes. Don't forget to subscribe to the podcast and visit us at shorettesbaitandtackle.com. Until next time, tight lines and happy fishing!

Guidelines:
- Write 450-600 words total
- Conversational, friendly tone like talking to fishing buddies
- Be specific with measurements and details
- Include enthusiasm and energy
- Keep it authentic and helpful",
  "stream": false,
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.85,
    "top_p": 0.9
  }
}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
# Save script to temp file
cat > /tmp/podcast_script.txt << 'SCRIPT_EOF'
{{ $json.script }}
SCRIPT_EOF

# Generate audio with Piper
echo "Generating audio with Piper..."
docker exec -i piper-tts python3 -m piper --model en_US-ryan-high --output_file /tmp/podcast_audio.wav < /tmp/podcast_script.txt

# Check if file was created
if [ -f /tmp/podcast_audio.wav ]; then
  echo "===AUDIO_START==="
  base64 -w 0 /tmp/podcast_audio.wav
  echo ""
  echo "===AUDIO_END==="
  ls -lh /tmp/podcast_audio.wav
else
  echo "ERROR: Audio file not created"
  exit 1
fi

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/podcast_script.txt /tmp/podcast_audio.wav

echo "Audio generated successfully"

nodes.name: Generate Audio (Ryan High)
nodes.notes: SSH to Pi and run Piper directly

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama3.1:8b",
  "prompt": "Create engaging show notes for this fishing podcast:

Title: {{ $node['Parse Script'].json.title }}

Script:
{{ $node['Parse Script'].json.script }}

Generate:

## EPISODE DESCRIPTION
Write 150 words that make people want to listen. Highlight key tips and what they'll learn.

## KEY TAKEAWAYS
• List 5-7 main tips from the episode
• Make each actionable and specific

## TIMESTAMPS (Estimated)
0:00 - Introduction
0:30 - First tip
... (create timestamps for main sections)

## SEO KEYWORDS
List 15 fishing keywords (comma separated) for search optimization

## SOCIAL MEDIA POST
Write an exciting 280-character tweet/post to promote this episode. Make it engaging!

## YOUTUBE DESCRIPTION
Create a description optimized for YouTube with:
- Quick summary
- Timestamps
- Links to shorettesbaitandtackle.com
- Relevant hashtags

Format with clear markdown headers.",
  "stream": false,
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.75
  }
}

parameters.content:
=# 🎙️ Podcast Episode Complete!

---

## {{ $json.title }}

**Published:** {{ $json.date }}  
**Duration:** ~{{ $json.duration_minutes }} minutes  
**Word Count:** {{ $json.word_count }} words

---

## 📝 FULL SCRIPT

{{ $json.full_script }}

---

## 📋 SHOW NOTES

{{ $json.show_notes }}

---

## 🎵 AUDIO STATUS

**Audio Generated:** {{ $json.audio_generated ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No' }}  
**File Size:** {{ $json.audio_size_kb }} KB  
**Voice:** Ryan High (Piper TTS)  
**Quality:** 22050 Hz, 16-bit, Mono

---

## 🚀 NEXT STEPS

1. ✅ Script written and reviewed
2. ✅ Audio generated with professional voice
3. ✅ Show notes created
4. ⬜ Add intro/outro music
5. ⬜ Upload to podcast hosting (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, etc.)
6. ⬜ Publish to website
7. ⬜ Share on social media
8. ⬜ Update RSS feed

---

## 📊 EPISODE METRICS

**Episode Number:** {{ $json.episode_number }}  
**Status:** {{ $json.status }}  
**Created:** {{ $json.created_at }}  
**Generator:** {{ $json.created_by }}

---

## 🔗 LINKS

**Store:** {{ $json.store_url }}  
**Podcast Page:** {{ $json.podcast_url }}

---

*Generated automatically by Perry AI on your local infrastructure*  
*Pi 5 (Hailo-8) + Windows PC (Ollama) + n8n*
